notes: European standards body (CEN, paired with CENELEC for electrotechnical). Publishes EN standards including EN ISO/IEC adoptions and CEN-original standards. EN 18031 (consumer-product cybersecurity, mandated by EU RED Article 3.3) and the prEN AI Act technical standards are particularly relevant. Paywalled via national standards bodies (DIN, AFNOR, BSI, UNE, etc.).
